item.title: Trying to build for armv7
item.author: ralsina
item.content:encoded: Lately there are a number of REALLY cheap development boards that I would like to use for some hardware development projects. However they are 32 bit armv7l architecture.The platforms page says it’s a tier 2 platform, so “it should work but CI doesn’t run”Is there any guide on how to try building the compiler in that platform or to build compiler that targets that platform?
